# Prerelease Gate — 2026-07-16

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-meet
- HEAD: f8d1ed7b2e2603388db1c98e7a8c9fb36a676b1d
- Last release: none (first release)
- Proposed target: v0.4.0-beta.1 (bump: none)
- Gate: blocked

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | CI workflow `verify` completed success on push to main (run 29441975357, headSha matches HEAD); CodeQL success |
| Version consistency | PASS | 1 hardcoded release version checked and corrected; dev fallback intentionally left unchanged |
| README / doc currency | BLOCK | README claims foundation-only, but capture/transcription/agent features are implemented; privacy.md claims model downloads not implemented |
| Coverage vs threshold | BLOCK | Cannot measure locally: XCTest module unavailable in CommandLineTools environment; CI is the canonical test gate |
| Coverage regression | BLOCK | Baseline n/a (first release) but cannot verify due to local test environment failure |
| Patch coverage | BLOCK | Cannot compute: tests cannot run in local environment |
| Assets preview | BLOCK | Required `SymMeetAgent_vVERSION.dmg` has no build script or signing/notarization step |
| Distribution publishers | BLOCK | GitHub release writer present for CLI tar.gz; DMG producer missing; Homebrew tap/publisher missing for documented install command |
| Security | PASS | 0 open critical/high Dependabot alerts |

## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Distribution] DMG artifact has no producer or signing/notarization step**
  - **Status quo:** `.github/workflows/release.yml:29-42` expects to upload `dist/SymMeetAgent_v*.dmg`, but `scripts/build-release.sh` only builds the CLI binary. There is no script that builds an `.app`, signs it with a Developer ID certificate, notarizes it, or packages it as a DMG. `docs/releasing.md:36-48` lists the DMG as a required asset and references `APPLE_*` secrets, but the workflow does not use them.
  - **Likely cause:** The release workflow was added before agent app packaging automation existed.
  - **Proposed solution:** Either add a real agent app build/sign/notarize/DMG step to `release.yml` (and reference the required secrets), or remove the DMG from the expected assets and docs until it is ready.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` → `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Distribution] Documented Homebrew install has no tap or publisher**
  - **Status quo:** `docs/getting-started.md:6-7` instructs users to run `brew install danieljustus/tap/symmeet`. The tap `danieljustus/tap` does not exist, and `release.yml` has no step that writes or updates a Homebrew formula. There is no repository-level or Environment secret referenced for a Homebrew token.
  - **Likely cause:** Homebrew distribution was planned but not implemented.
  - **Proposed solution:** Create the `danieljustus/tap` repository, add a `symmeet` formula, and add a `homebrew` publishing step to `release.yml` (or remove the Homebrew command from the docs until it is available).
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` → `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] README status is inconsistent with shipped capabilities**
  - **Status quo:** `README.md:11-13` says "audio capture, decoding, transcription, model downloads, cloud providers, accounts, and a graphical application are deliberately not implemented yet." The codebase already contains `SymMeetCapture`, transcription via `SymMeetWhisperKit`, model management (`symmeet model list/install`), the `SymMeetAgent` menu-bar app, and the `record`/`transcribe`/`export` CLI workflows.
  - **Likely cause:** README was not updated after the v0.2.0/v0.3.0/v0.4.0-beta.1 feature PRs landed.
  - **Proposed solution:** Rewrite the README status paragraph to describe the current beta capabilities (local transcription, capture, agent app, MCP server) and remaining gaps (cloud providers, accounts, etc.).
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` → `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] privacy.md says model downloads are not implemented**
  - **Status quo:** `docs/privacy.md:17-18` states "This beta does not yet implement model downloads," but `symmeet model list` and `symmeet model install` are implemented and `docs/getting-started.md:28-35` documents them.
  - **Likely cause:** The privacy doc was written before the model-management workflow landed and was not updated.
  - **Proposed solution:** Update the model-download privacy boundary to describe the actual behavior (bytes fetched to a local cache, no meeting content transmitted).
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` → `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Coverage] Local test environment cannot run tests or coverage**
  - **Status quo:** `swift test` and `swift test --enable-code-coverage` both fail with `unable to resolve module dependency: 'XCTest'` because this machine uses `/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools` without XCTest. CI (`make test`) passed on the same HEAD, so the code is not at fault; the local environment is insufficient for the full prerelease tier.
  - **Likely cause:** CommandLineTools installation does not include XCTest; a full Xcode install is required for Swift testing on macOS.
  - **Proposed solution:** Re-run `/06-gh-prerelease` on a machine with full Xcode installed, or explicitly accept the verified CI result and run `/test-coverage` on CI-capable hardware. Do not release without a fresh coverage measurement.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage --baseline-ref v0.4.0-beta.1` (on a machine with full Xcode) or `/02-gh-plan --from-review` to add CI-based coverage gating.

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `Sources/SymMeetMCP/MCPServer.swift:96` hardcoded MCP server version `"0.1.0"` → `"0.4.0-beta.1"` (matches target release version and the handshake example in `docs/releasing.md:33`).

## Next step
- gate=blocked → resolve the BLOCK findings via their handoff commands, then re-run `/06-gh-prerelease`
